hero.tagline1: Simplify your finances. Invest smarter. Join the movement.
hero.tagline2: Manage, save, and invest — all in one app designed for you.

features.title: Your money, clear and under control

movimientos.title: Transaction overview
movimientos.desc: We classify income and expenses and show you "where your money goes".

reportes.title: Reports & trends
reportes.desc: Visualize your month and compare your progress.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: We help you organize your finances, measure your progress, and stay on track with personalized reminders and recommendations.

step1.desc: Connect your accounts and define your goals (savings, debts, expenses).

step2.desc: Track your progress in real time: budget, savings, debts, and habits.

step3.desc: Adjust your plan with clear recommendations: what to cut, what to prioritize, and when to pay.

investment.title: What we're building ...
investment.p1: Finnova is being built with a clear goal: to make improving your financial health simple, practical, and accessible. We're creating a platform that transforms your data into clarity and your decisions into progress, with personalized recommendations and an action plan you can actually follow.
investment.p2: This is just the beginning, and we want you to be part of it. If you believe managing your money shouldn't be complicated or stressful, join Finnova: try it, share your feedback, and help us design the tool that will make a difference for thousands of people.

forms.headlineMid: and be among the first to try the

forms.errorName: Please enter your full name (minimum 3 characters).
forms.errorPhone: Phone must have between 10 and 20 digits.
forms.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
forms.errorAge: Age must be between 0 and 99 years.
forms.errorCaptcha: Complete the security check before continuing.

footer.cta: Are you ready to change your financial future?
